truthordare.details: just a classic truth or dare prompt if you're bored.

quiz.details: i'll drop a random question. answer right to get points.

slot.details: spin the slots and pray the icons match so you win coins.

daily.details: grab your free daily points once a day.

start.details: basically a quick intro and a list of my main stuff.

about.details: if you're actually curious about me or whatever.

support.details: spawns some group links that delete themselves after 5 seconds.

rank.details: shows the leaderboard to see who has the most points right now.

ping.details: just to check if i'm actually awake and responding.

callad.details: pulls up the admin contact links for 5 seconds.

ban.details: blocks someone from using me entirely.

unban.details: lets someone back in after they've been banned.

update.details: changes what role or permissions a user has.

notify.details: blasts a message out to everyone using the bot at once.

leave.details: makes me dip from either one group or all of them.
